program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Inventory the H00 preflight fields Hermes records before RP00 Product Constitution And AI Control Plane implementation advances beyond the contract and acceptance baseline.
claude_questions: Does h00_preflight_scope_inventory bind to RP00.P00.M08.S01 and define H00 preflight field scope only?

Does it include subphase_id, source_micro_phase_id, executed_at, command_receipts, evidence_summary, blocked_claims, gate_outcome, no_real_data, writes_product_state, claude_review_dependency, and human_approval_boundary?
Does it identify the H00 command ids product_contract_validate, rp00_control_plane_contract_validate, and spec_requirement_validate plus packet/command-evidence/H00 artifacts?
Does it preserve metadata-only, no-real-data, writes_product_state=false, no RP00 closeout, C00 review dependency, human approval boundary, and next boundary RP00.P00.M08.S02?
Does it avoid production mutation, real-data import, generation output approval, C00/human replacement, or RP00 completion claims?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
